title: EP - Enter key triggers login
precondition: Login form is displayed and focused
test_steps:
Navigate to login form
Click inside the form to set focus
Press the Enter key

title: DT - Enter pressed triggers login (Rule 0)
precondition: Login form is displayed and focused
test_steps:
Navigate to login form
Click inside the form to set focus
Press the Enter key

title: DT - Enter not pressed does nothing (Rule 1)

Click inside the form to set focus
Press the Space key

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The login process is initiated by triggering the login() function.
